meta.name: 极简现代
meta.description: 极简风格，左对齐标题无装饰，干净利落，适合技术/日常内容

styles.container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75 !important; word-wrap: break-word;
styles.h1: font-size: 28px; font-weight: 800; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 44px !important; margin-bottom: 28px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: -0.03em; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h2: font-size: 24px; font-weight: 700; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 36px !important; margin-bottom: 24px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: -0.02em; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h3: font-size: 20px; font-weight: 700; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; letter-spacing: -0.01em; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h4: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 22px !important; margin-bottom: 18px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h5: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 16px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h6: font-size: 15px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 14px !important; margin-bottom: 12px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.p: margin: 5px 0 20px !important; line-height: 1.75em !important; text-align: start !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #2c2c2c !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strong: font-weight: 700; color: #3498db !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.em: font-style: italic; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strike: text-decoration: line-through; opacity: 0.65; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.u: text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: #3498db; text-underline-offset: 2px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.a: color: #3498db !important; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ul: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 20px; list-style-type: disc; color: #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.ol: margin: 8px 0 !important; padding-left: 20px; list-style-type: decimal; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.li: margin: 0; line-height: 1.6 !important; padding-left: 0; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.liText: color: inherit; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskList: margin: 8px 0 !important;; padding-left: 20px; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItem: margin: 10px 0; line-height: 1.7 !important; padding-left: 4px; list-style: none; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 18px; height: 18px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; accent-color: #3498db;
styles.blockquote: margin: 4px 0; padding: 16px 8px 1px 8px !important; border-left: 3px solid #3498db; font-style: italic; opacity: 0.85; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; padding: 2px 4px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.05) !important; border-radius: 2px;
styles.pre: margin: 28px 0; padding: 20px; background-color: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03) !important; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
styles.hr: margin: 3rem 0; border: none; height: 1px; background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2);
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 32px auto;
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 16px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.th: padding: 12px 16px; text-align: left; border-bottom: 2px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.15); font-weight: 700; word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.td: padding: 12px 16px; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08); word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.codeBlockPre: background: rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.03); padding: 0; border-radius: 0; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 28px 0; border: 1px solid rgba(0, 0, 0, 0.08);
styles.codeBlockCode: font-family: "SF Mono", Consolas, Monaco, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.6; display: block; white-space: pre; padding: 20px;

meta.name: 优雅对称
meta.description: 居中标题带上下细线装饰，对称优雅，适合正式/文艺内容

styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 16px; height: 16px; vertical-align: middle; cursor-pointer; accent-color: #3498db;

styles.pre: margin: 24px 0; padding: 16px; background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.05) !important; border-radius: 6px; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.15);
styles.hr: margin: 2rem auto; border: none; height: 3px; width: 60%; background-color: #3498db;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 24px auto; border-radius: 6px;
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;

styles.taskList: padding-left: 8px; list-style: none; margin: 8px 0 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItem: line-height: 1.8 !important; list-style: none; color: #2c2c2c !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.taskListItemCheckbox: margin-right: 10px; width: 14px; height: 14px; vertical-align: middle; cursor: pointer; accent-color: #3498db;
styles.blockquote: margin: 4px 0; padding: 16px 8px 1px 8px !important; font-size: 15px; color: #555555 !important; background: linear-gradient(135deg, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.05), rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.02)); border-left: 3px solid #3498db; border-radius: 0 8px 8px 0; line-height: 1.8 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.code: font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 0.9em; padding: 2px 6px; background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.06) !important; color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.85) !important; border-radius: 4px;
styles.pre: margin: 28px 0; padding: 18px; background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.03) !important; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; line-height: 1.6 !important; box-shadow: 0 2px 10px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.05);
styles.hr: margin: 2.5rem auto; border: none; height: 1px; width: 50%; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.3), rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.3), transparent);
styles.img: max-width: 100%; max-height: 600px !important; height: auto; display: block; margin: 28px auto; border-radius: 6px; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.1); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.06), 0 8px 24px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.08);
styles.table: min-width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-size: 15px; box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.04), 0 4px 12px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.03); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.th: background: linear-gradient(180deg, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.15) 0%, rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.08) 100%) !important; padding: 20px 28px; text-align: left; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px; color: #3498db !important; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.2); border-top: 3px solid #3498db; word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.td: padding: 20px 28px; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.75; background: #ffffff !important; color: #3a3a3a !important; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.12); word-break: keep-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.codeBlockPre: background-color: #2d3748; padding: 0; border-radius: 8px; overflow-x: auto; overflow-y: hidden; margin: 28px 0; border: 1px solid rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.15); box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.1);
styles.codeBlockCode: color: #e2e8f0; font-family: "SF Mono", Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.7; display: block; white-space: pre; padding: 20px;

meta.name: 醒目风格
meta.description: H1 满色背景圆角卡片，视觉冲击力强，适合营销/品牌内容

styles.container: max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 8px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif; font-size: 16px; line-height: 1.75 !important; word-wrap: break-word;
styles.h1: font-size: 26px; font-weight: 700; color: #ffffff !important; margin-top: 44px !important; margin-bottom: 28px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; background-color: #3498db; padding: 16px 24px; border-radius: 16px; box-shadow: 0 4px 12px rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.25); font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h2: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 36px !important; margin-bottom: 24px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 12px; border-left: 4px solid #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h3: font-size: 19px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 28px !important; margin-bottom: 20px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding: 6px 12px; background-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.1); border-radius: 6px; border-left: 3px solid #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h4: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 22px !important; margin-bottom: 18px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 10px; border-left: 3px solid #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h5: font-size: 17px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 16px !important; margin-bottom: 10px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 8px; border-left: 2px solid #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.h6: font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; margin-top: 14px !important; margin-bottom: 12px !important; line-height: 1.4em !important; word-break: break-all; padding-left: 8px; border-left: 2px dashed #3498db; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.p: margin: 5px 0 20px !important; line-height: 1.75em !important; text-align: start !important; font-size: 16px; font-weight: 400; color: #2c2c2c !important; word-break: break-all; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strong: font-weight: 600; color: #3498db !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.em: font-style: italic; color: #444444 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.strike: text-decoration: line-through; color: #888888 !important; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.u: text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-color: rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.35); text-underline-offset: 3px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
styles.a: color: #3498db !important; text-decoration: none; background-image: linear-gradient(rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.4), rgba(52, 152, 219, 0.4)); background-size: 100% 1px; background-position: 0 100%; background-repeat: no-repeat; padding-bottom: 1px; font-family: PingFang SC,system-ui,-apple-system,BlinkMacSystemFont,Helvetica Neue,Hiragino Sans GB,Microsoft YaHei UI,Microsoft YaHei,Arial,sans-serif;
